title: Clone ERD View with Confirm and Cancel Actions
story: As a DataTools Pro user managing ERD views, I want to clone an existing view so I can quickly create a new variation without rebuilding the object selection and layout from scratch.
description:
Adds a Clone action to ERD views. When a user selects Clone, the view name field expands pre-populated with the original name plus "Clone" appended. The user can modify the name and confirm (save) or cancel the operation.

The action buttons are reorganized below the dropdown in a single line: Edit, Clone, Delete — keeping all view management actions in one place. A confirm (check) and cancel (X) button appear during clone and edit operations so the user can commit or exit the action.

The Delete button is moved from its previous location to sit under the view name alongside Edit and Clone for a cleaner UX.
acceptance_criteria: A Clone button appears below the ERD view dropdown alongside Edit and Delete
Clicking Clone pre-fills the view name with the original name plus 'Clone' appended
Confirm (save) and Cancel (X) buttons appear during clone operation
Cancel discards the clone and returns to the previous view state
Confirm saves the cloned view with the new name and selected objects
The same Confirm/Cancel buttons appear during Edit operations
Action buttons are ordered: Edit, Clone, Delete in a single line
ux_changes: New Clone button in the ERD view action bar. Reorganized Edit/Clone/Delete buttons in a single row below the dropdown. Confirm and Cancel buttons appear during clone and edit operations for clear action commitment.
middleware_changes: Clone operation duplicates the selected view's object list and creates a new ERD view record with the cloned name and settings.
implementation_notes: Initially implemented on the Entity Diagram page with plan to extend to Dictionary and Migration pages. The action button order was refined to Edit, Clone, Delete based on feedback. The clone operation appends 'Clone' to the original view name by default.
comment_summary: Developer implemented clone on the ERD page first. Feedback requested hiding other controls during clone, appending 'Clone' to the title, and reordering buttons to Edit/Clone/Delete. Final layout with confirm/cancel buttons was approved on staging.
